Not sure if it is in fact a mission fig, but the tree does produce edible figs. Tree is just off the left side of the road when you are going up the train hill. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-September.

Looking east, vines are on the right side of the street along the fence from the house to the auto yard. Please leave the grapes on the house's fence for the occupants, but the ones on the auto yard are fair game. Falling Fruit season: August-September.
